merged_dimensions.name: 空间布局
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 元素在屏幕边缘的分布位置，优先角落区域避免遮挡棋盘视野

merged_dimensions.name: 玩家身份标识
merged_dimensions.description: 2-4 名玩家的视觉区分：色块/图标/头像框，确保本地多玩家快速识别各自状态

merged_dimensions.name: 信息层次结构
merged_dimensions.description: 锁定字段与次要信息的视觉权重分配，当前玩家信息最突出，其他玩家信息紧凑排列

merged_dimensions.name: 状态反馈
merged_dimensions.description: 轮到玩家/待决策/等待他人等状态的实时视觉指示，降低玩家认知负担

merged_dimensions.name: 可读性设计
merged_dimensions.description: 字体大小/对比度/图标语义，确保文字缩放模式下仍可读，满足色盲友好配色

merged_dimensions.name: 模块化与遮挡规避
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 与弹窗的层级关系设计，确保购买/租金/监狱弹窗出现时 HUD 局部收缩或透明

merged_dimensions.name: 对称与平衡
merged_dimensions.description: 多玩家信息对称排列（屏侧边栏或环绕式布局），确保每名玩家视角信息量对等

merged_dimensions.name: 时间线索
merged_dimensions.description: 回合编号与倒计时/等待时长的渐进式提示，辅助玩家感知游戏节奏

merged_dimensions.name: 上下文自适应
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 根据游戏阶段动态调整：正常回合/交易中/危机时刻的信息展示策略

merged_dimensions.name: 无障碍适配
merged_dimensions.description: 高对比度模式/图标+文字双通道/屏幕阅读器兼容，确保视觉障碍玩家可获取信息

merged_dimensions.name: 布局区域划分
merged_dimensions.description: 定义 HUD 元素在屏幕上的可放置区域。需避开中央棋盘区域(28格完整可见)和底部/顶部弹出窗口区域。典型分区：顶部信息栏(玩家状态/回合)、底部快捷操作栏、角落资源指示器。需保证所有区域不遮挡 property_card/purchase_dialog/rent_dialog/prison_dialog。

merged_dimensions.name: 数据绑定源
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 各字段绑定到后端状态的路径。current_player → game_state.current_turn_index，player_cash → game_state.players[current].cash，turn_number → game_state.turn_counter。UI 层仅读状态，不持有状态副本。

merged_dimensions.name: 刷新触发机制
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 更新策略。推荐事件驱动：game_event_bus.on('player_cash_changed')、game_event_bus.on('turn_changed')。避免每帧轮询。最小化绘制调用：合并同一帧内多个状态变化的更新。玩家头像/现金变化需即时响应，回合切换可带 0.3s 淡入动画。

merged_dimensions.name: 层级堆叠顺序
merged_dimensions.description: Unity UI Canvas 层级规划。Board(0) → HUD(10) → Modal_Overlay(20) → Dialog_Purchase(30) → Dialog_Rent(31) → Dialog_Prison(32)。HUD 固定 Z=10，确保 dialog 自动遮盖 HUD 但 HUD 不遮挡 dialog。

merged_dimensions.name: 多人玩家指示器
merged_dimensions.description: 2-4 名玩家的视觉区分。顶部条显示所有玩家状态卡片(头像、昵称、现金)，当前行动玩家高亮。现金需实时更新以体现交易。布局需适配 2/3/4 人：2人横排，3人横排+下角，4人四宫格。

merged_dimensions.name: 屏幕适配策略
merged_dimensions.description: 不同分辨率/长宽比下的响应式布局。使用 Canvas Scaler + 基于 Anchor 的流式布局。16:9/16:10/4:3 需保证棋盘区域不变形，HUD 区域可压缩但不消失。最小安全区：顶部 5%高度、底部 8%高度用于 HUD。

merged_dimensions.name: 动画性能约束
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 内动画需可控。现金数字变化使用 CountingTextAnimator 而非每帧 lerp。状态切换淡入淡出 ≤ 300ms。使用 CanvasGroup 控制显隐而非 Destroy/Instantiate 重建。避免粒子系统和复杂 shader 以保证 60fps。

merged_dimensions.name: 弹窗交互行为
merged_dimensions.description: 当 purchase/rent/prison dialog 弹出时，HUD 应自动收起非关键元素(如轮次指示器淡出)，弹窗结束后恢复。可使用事件监听 dialog_shown/dialog_closed 信号。HUD 自身不得阻塞 raycast，dialog 独占交互焦点。

merged_dimensions.name: Layout Position
merged_dimensions.description: Defines where the HUD sits relative to the board: top‑bar, bottom‑bar, or side‑panel. Must keep the 28 squares fully visible and avoid overlapping any central area where purchase/rent/prison pop‑ups appear.

merged_dimensions.name: Visual Hierarchy
merged_dimensions.description: Prioritizes the three locked fields (current player, cash, turn number) so they are instantly readable. Uses size, contrast, and placement to lead the eye to the most critical data first.

merged_dimensions.name: Color Scheme
merged_dimensions.description: Chooses a palette that harmonizes with the board’s visual style while providing enough contrast for legibility. Includes a muted base to avoid distraction and accent colors for key states (e.g., active player).

merged_dimensions.name: Typography
merged_dimensions.description: Selects typefaces and font sizes that remain crisp on all supported resolutions. Uses bold weights for critical info (current player) and lighter weights for supporting data (turn number).

merged_dimensions.name: Iconography
merged_dimensions.description: Integrates clear icons (e.g., coin for cash, arrow for turn) to support quick scanning and reinforce the Monopoly theme.

merged_dimensions.name: Transparency / Opacity
merged_dimensions.description: Sets background opacity of the HUD panel so it does not visually clash with the board yet remains legible. Semi‑transparent panels are preferred to keep the board visible.

merged_dimensions.name: Edge Margins
merged_dimensions.description: Ensures a safe zone around the HUD so UI elements are never clipped by screen edges or hidden by pop‑ups.

merged_dimensions.name: Player Indicator
merged_dimensions.description: Visualizes whose turn it is (e.g., colored badge, avatar, or highlight) with a consistent style that matches the player tokens on the board.

merged_dimensions.name: Cash Display
merged_dimensions.description: Shows each player’s cash amount using a compact numeric format, optional currency symbol, and a small coin icon. The layout should accommodate 2‑4 players without clutter.

merged_dimensions.name: Turn Counter
merged_dimensions.description: Presents the current turn number in a minimal, non‑intrusive manner, preferably near the player indicator for easy correlation.

merged_dimensions.name: Responsive Scaling
merged_dimensions.description: Ensures the HUD scales proportionally on different screen sizes and aspect ratios while preserving the integrity of the 28‑square board view.

merged_dimensions.name: Accessibility Contrast
merged_dimensions.description: Meets contrast ratio guidelines for text and iconography so that players with visual impairments can read the HUD under typical lighting.

merged_dimensions.name: Animation & Feedback
merged_dimensions.description: Adds subtle animations (e.g., pulse on cash change, slide‑in on turn change) that reinforce state changes without obscuring the board or pop‑ups.

merged_dimensions.name: Multiplayer Labeling
merged_dimensions.description: Supports clear labeling of player names/colors in a compact way (e.g., color‑coded badges) to avoid confusion during local multiplayer sessions.

merged_dimensions.name: Theme Consistency
merged_dimensions.description: Ensures the HUD’s visual style (shapes, textures, borders) aligns with the overall Monopoly board theme to maintain brand recognizability.

ux-designer.hud.player_identity: Active player name plus color‑coded avatar
ux-designer.hud.info_hierarchy: Primary: current player, Secondary: cash, Tertiary: turn number
ux-designer.hud.state_feedback: Animated cash pulse on changes and subtle turn indicator
ux-designer.hud.readability: High‑contrast sans‑serif text at minimum 14 pt, scalable
ux-designer.hud.modularity: Separate widget panels for player, cash, and turn
ux-designer.hud.symmetry_balance: Mirror‑symmetrical layout with player panels evenly spaced left‑right
ux-designer.hud.temporal_cues: Turn number with a thin progress bar
ux-designer.hud.contextual_adaptation: HUD reduces opacity to 70 % and hides non‑essential elements when a modal is open
ux-designer.hud.accessibility: Color‑blind safe palette and adjustable font size
ux-designer.hud.layout_zone: Top zone for HUD, bottom zone reserved for action buttons
ux-designer.hud.data_binding_source: GameState singleton bound to HUD widgets
ux-designer.hud.refresh_trigger: Event‑driven updates on onTurnChanged and onCashChanged
ux-designer.hud.z_order_stacking: HUD rendered below modal dialogs but above the board
ux-designer.hud.multiplayer_indicator: Player color strips alongside the player name in the HUD
ux-designer.hud.screen_adaptation: Responsive scaling anchored to screen width, max 90 % width
ux-designer.hud.overlay_behavior: HUD overlays the board but hides when a modal appears
ux-designer.hud.layout_position: Fixed at top‑center with 20 px side margins
ux-designer.hud.visual_hierarchy: Current player name largest, cash medium, turn smallest
ux-designer.hud.color_scheme: Dark semi‑transparent background (#00000080) with white text and distinct player accent colors
ux-designer.hud.typography: Sans‑serif font (Roboto/Open Sans) with bold headings
ux-designer.hud.iconography: Simple icons: user silhouette, coin, clock
ux-designer.hud.transparency_opacity: Base 100 % opacity, reduced to 70 % during modal state
ux-designer.hud.edge_margins: 20 px margin from all screen edges
ux-designer.hud.player_indicator: Color‑coded circle plus avatar next to the player name
ux-designer.hud.cash_display: Currency formatted with symbol, animated pulse on value change
ux-designer.hud.turn_counter: Text label ‘Turn X’ with numeric value
ux-designer.hud.responsive_scaling: Scale factor based on 1080p baseline, UI scales proportionally
ux-designer.hud.accessibility_contrast: Contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for all HUD text
ux-designer.hud.animation_feedback: Pulse effect on cash increase, slide effect on turn change
ux-designer.hud.multiplayer_labeling: Labels show player number (P1, P2…) and name
ux-designer.hud.theme_consistency: HUD uses the same color palette, fonts, and style as the rest of the game UI
